name: The First National Bank In Cimarron
description_short: Full-service community bank serving Cimarron and Ingalls, Kansas since 1929 with online and mobile banking, loans, and traditional deposit accounts.
description_long:
First National Bank in Cimarron is a locally-rooted financial institution that has been operating since 1929, positioning itself as a "Proud Hometown Bank" serving the Cimarron and Ingalls, Kansas communities. The bank operates two physical branches and offers comprehensive banking services designed to meet the needs of local residents and small business customers in rural Kansas.

The bank provides a full range of traditional banking services including checking and savings accounts, certificates of deposit, online banking available 24/7, and mobile banking through iOS and Android applications. They offer loans for multiple purposes with flexible terms and conditions, though specific loan products, rates, and terms are not detailed on their publicly available website. Customers can access their accounts remotely through secure online and mobile platforms, and the bank maintains customer service via phone (620-855-3416 for Cimarron, 620-335-5111 for Ingalls) and online contact forms.

What distinguishes FNB Cimarron is its decades-long presence as a community bank in a rural Kansas market, emphasizing local service and personalized banking relationships. The bank is FDIC-insured (implied by routing number 101105257) and holds NMLS# 441722. They prioritize security with features like debit card fraud reporting and identity theft protection information, and maintain separate mailing addresses and contact numbers for each branch location.

As a community bank, FNB Cimarron may appeal to customers prioritizing local relationships and service, but the website provides limited transparency regarding specific product features, rates, fees, and loan terms. Consumers should contact the bank directly or visit branches in person to obtain detailed information about account types, APY rates, loan products, and fee structures before making financial decisions. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Mobile banking application for iOS and Android devices
Debit card issuance with lost or stolen card reporting
Wire transfers and money movement services
Online contact forms and secure messaging for customer inquiries
E-statement signup and digital account management
Holiday and extended hours customer service
pros: Two convenient branch locations in Cimarron and Ingalls, Kansas with separate local phone numbers
24/7 online banking platform accessible from any device
Mobile banking app available on both Apple App Store and Google Play Store
Over 95 years of community banking history since 1929
Full-service bank offering loans with flexible terms for multiple purposes
Secure online contact form and secure messaging options for account inquiries
FDIC-insured deposit accounts and NMLS-regulated institution
cons: Limited geographic service area restricted to two small rural Kansas towns
Website lacks detailed information about account types, interest rates, APY, and fee structures
Loan products and terms not specified on website; customers must contact bank directly for details
No online account opening functionality clearly indicated on homepage
Rural location may limit accessibility for customers outside Cimarron and Ingalls area
best_for: Residents of Cimarron or Ingalls, Kansas seeking local banking relationships
Small business owners in northwest Kansas needing community bank lending
Customers prioritizing in-person service at locally-staffed branch locations
Rural Kansas residents wanting traditional banking with digital convenience options
diagnosis: First National Bank in Cimarron is best suited for residents of Cimarron or Ingalls, Kansas who value local banking relationships and personalized service from a community bank with 95+ years of operating history. The primary caveat is that potential customers must contact the bank directly via phone or branch visit to obtain specific details about account types, interest rates, fees, and loan products, as this information is not provided on their public website.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
fdic_official_name: The First National Bank in Cimarron
